raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1447 provides a direct incentive through tax credits to small businesses that hire employees.",
    "Small businesses are struggling due to COVID-19 and need support to rebuild.",
    "Small businesses make up the backbone of the economy and can help decrease statewide record unemployment.",
    "SB 1447 allows small businesses that have suffered declining revenues to start hiring again.",
    "The tax credit established by SB 1447 can be applied against income tax liabilities or sales and use tax liabilities."
  ]
}
```
